implementation.path_a: Primary source (G2 for tech industries, Google for professional services/accounting/law/logistics/recruitment)
implementation.path_b: Secondary source (Capterra as fallback for most industries)
implementation.execution: Both paths run in parallel, results merged with deduplication
implementation.ranking: URLs appearing in both paths ranked first (higher relevance)

functions: apply_b2b_filter() — filters discovered URLs by B2B/exclude keywords

industries_list: hr_tech (keywords: hr, human resources, payroll, people ops, workforce, employee, hiring, onboarding, hris, talent management, for hr, hr teams, hr platform, workforce management)
fintech (keywords: fintech, payments, banking, financial technology, lending, insurtech, wealthtech, regtech)
marketing_tech (keywords: marketing, martech, advertising, seo, crm, email marketing, analytics, growth)
legal_tech (keywords: legal tech, legaltech, law tech, contract management, legal software, e-discovery, compliance software)
saas (keywords: software, platform, saas, api, app, dashboard, cloud, subscription, b2b software)
professional_services (keywords: consulting, advisory, professional services, management consulting, strategy consulting, business consulting)
logistics (keywords: logistics, freight, shipping, supply chain, warehousing, last mile, 3pl, transportation)
recruitment (keywords: recruitment, recruiting, staffing, talent acquisition, headhunting, executive search, talent, placement)
accounting (keywords: accounting, bookkeeping, tax advisory, cpa, chartered accountant, tax preparation, small business accounting, fractional cfo, cfo services)
law_firm (keywords: law firm, solicitor, attorney, legal services, counsel, barrister, commercial law, corporate law, employment law, contract law)

return_structure.b2b_filter: dict or None — filter config from INDUSTRY_MAP
return_structure.confidence: str — 'high' (>=3 matches), 'medium' (1-2 matches), 'low' (0 matches, default to saas)
